metadata.title: All Through the Night
metadata.album: She's So Unusual: A 30th Anniversary Celebration (Deluxe Edition)
metadata.lyrics:
[00:05.02] All through the night
[00:10.16] I'll be awake and I'll be with you
[00:15.25] All through the night
[00:20.39] This precious time when time is new
[00:25.36] Oh
[00:27.99] All through the night today
[00:32.82] Knowin' that we feel the same without sayin'
[00:39.98] We have no past, we won't reach back
[00:44.84] Keep with me forward all through the night
[00:49.68] And once we start, the meter clicks
[00:54.96] And it goes running all through the night
[01:00.04] Until it ends, there is no end
[01:08.37] All through the night
[01:11.98] Stray cat is crying so stray cat sings back
[01:17.06] All through the night
[01:22.06] They have forgotten, what bindin' they lack
[01:26.96] Oh
[01:29.76] Under those white street lamps
[01:34.76] There is a little chance they may see
[01:41.52] We have no past, we won't reach back
[01:46.60] Keep with me forward all through the night
[01:51.73] And once we start, the meter clicks
[01:56.56] And it goes running all through the night
[02:01.84] Until it ends, there is no end
[02:11.62] 
[02:29.09] Oh
[02:31.03] The sleep in your eyes is enough
[02:36.42] Let me be there, let me stay there awhile
[02:44.55] We have no past, we won't reach back
[02:49.80] Keep with me forward all through the night
[02:54.59] And once we start, the meter clicks
[02:59.87] And it goes running all through the night
[03:04.82] Until it ends, there is no end
